title: cyrtomium fortunei var. intermedium
intro: Cyrtomium fortunei var. intermedium, also known as the Intermediate Lady Fern or Cyrtomium fern, is a variety of the Cyrtomium fortunei plant, a type of evergreen fern native to East Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyrtomium fortunei var. intermedium include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Cyrtomium fortunei var. intermedium is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also dried and used in powder form or as an extract.
